name: XSA-All + LeakyReLU(0.75)² + Aggressive Legal TTT
blurb: XSA extended to all 11 layers (-0.0007 BPB), LeakyReLU(0.75)² activation (PR #977), and aggressive legal score-first TTT (lr=0.03, 15× higher than SOTA, -0.0033 BPB gain). Built on PR #414 stack with Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon. SDPA fallback included for environments without Flash Attention 3. Single seed: 1.1219 BPB, artifact 15.92MB.
author: Teddy Oweh
